channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Exclusive: Redistricting Initiative Urges Georgia GOP to Revise Affirmative Action Map
item.description: Speaker Jon Burns faced criticism for announcing Republicans would not address redistricting during the special session.

item.title: You Cannot Deter China by Ignoring Europe
item.description: A stronger, more united NATO reduces Beijing's incentive to test American resolve elsewhere.

item.title: The Department of Education Was a Bad Idea Then and Still Is
item.description: Nearly 50 years ago, the New York Times editorial page opposed the department's creation.

item.title: Democrats Wahab, Hernandez Advance in California Special Election for Swalwell's Seat
item.description: Democratic candidates secured the two slots for a special general election to complete former Rep. Eric Swalwell's term.
